function.name: lookup_shift
function.description: Call this as soon as the caller tells you their name, to look up their upcoming shift details in the schedule.

caregiver_name.description: The caregiver's name, as they said it on the call.

function.name: confirm_shift
function.description: Call this when the caregiver confirms they can work their scheduled shift.

function.name: decline_shift
function.description: Call this when the caregiver says they can't make the shift and does not have a friend or colleague to refer as a replacement.

function.name: lookup_coworker
function.description: Call this whenever the caregiver names a coworker who might cover the shift, to check whether that person is already in the system (in which case no phone number is needed).

name.description: The coworker's name as the caller said it.

function.name: refer_replacement
function.description: Call this once the caregiver has finished listing everyone (up to 3 people) who might be able to cover the shift. Phone numbers are only needed for people who are NOT already in the system (per lookup_coworker).

candidates.description: Up to 3 people who might cover the shift, in the order the caregiver mentioned them.

name.description: Name of the coworker/friend being referred as a replacement.

phone_number.description: Phone number, in E.164 format if possible (e.g. +15555550123). Omit for people already found in the system via lookup_coworker.

message_for_candidates.description: An optional personal message from the caregiver to relay to each person being called, if they gave one.

function.name: confirm_replacement
function.description: Call this once the referred friend has clearly stated whether they accept or decline covering the shift.

accepted.description: True if the person agreed to cover the shift, false if they declined.
